'''dhathafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vyaz|vyaz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vyaz|vyaz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhathafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæthæfæth|dhæthæfæth]] || [[word:dhæthæfæj|dhæthæfæj]] || [[word:dhæthæfæsh|dhæthæfæsh]] || [[word:dhæthæfæ|dhæthæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathathafath|dhathathafath]] || [[word:dhathathafaj|dhathathafaj]] || [[word:dhathathafash|dhathathafash]] || [[word:dhathathafa|dhathathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathafath|dhathafath]] || [[word:dhathafaj|dhathafaj]] || [[word:dhathafash|dhathafash]] || [[word:dhathafa|dhathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathaffath|dhathaffath]] || [[word:dhathaffaj|dhathaffaj]] || [[word:dhathaffash|dhathaffash]] || [[word:dhathaffaf|dhathaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhathafatha|dhathafatha]] || [[word:dhathafaja|dhathafaja]] || [[word:dhathafasha|dhathafasha]] || [[word:dhathafaka|dhathafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhathafath|dhathafath]] || [[word:dhathafaj|dhathafaj]] || [[word:dhathafash|dhathafash]] || [[word:dhathafa|dhathafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhathafathal|dhathafathal]] || [[word:dhathafajal|dhathafajal]] || [[word:dhathafashal|dhathafashal]] || [[word:dhathafakal|dhathafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhathafathatha|dhathafathatha]] || [[word:dhathafajaja|dhathafajaja]] || [[word:dhathafashasha|dhathafashasha]] || [[word:dhathafaka|dhathafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhathafathan|dhathafathan]] || [[word:dhathafajan|dhathafajan]] || [[word:dhathafashan|dhathafashan]] || [[word:dhathafakan|dhathafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhathafathaoro|dhathafathaoro]] || [[word:dhathafajaoro|dhathafajaoro]] || [[word:dhathafashaoro|dhathafashaoro]] || [[word:dhathafakaoro|dhathafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
